name: Grandma's Peach Shortcake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture is a coarse crumb.
3. Combine the egg and cream; add to the dry ingredients, stirring only to moisten.
4. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead gently for half a minute.
5. Pat or roll the dough to 1/2 inch thickness.
6. Cut into 6 biscuits using floured 2 1/2-inch round or fluted cutters.
7. Bake on an ungreased baking sheet in a very hot oven (450°F) for about 10 minutes.
8. Split the shortcakes and spread butter on the bottom layers.
9. Fill with sugared peaches and top with whipped cream.
10. Serve warm.
